title: Optimize V8 Flag Tuning
description: Identify key V8 flags for memory management, such as `-max-old-space-size` and `-heap-growing-percent`. Configure V8 flags to balance memory footprint against garbage collection pause frequency. Evaluate the impact of V8 flag tuning on application performance and stability.
objectives: Identify key V8 flags for memory management, such as `-max-old-space-size` and `-heap-growing-percent`.
Configure V8 flags to balance memory footprint against garbage collection pause frequency.
Evaluate the impact of V8 flag tuning on application performance and stability.
